title: Fig. 2 in Some Unusual Small-Subunit Ribosomal RNA Sequences of Metazoans
author: GIRIBET, GONZALO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. Phylogenetic tree of the centipedes based on the combined analysis of Edgecombe et al. (1999). The arrow indicates where the insertion of ca. 300 bp at region V7 occurred during the evolution of centipedes.
steps_raw: Fig. 2. Phylogenetic tree of the centipedes based on the combined analysis of Edgecombe et al. (1999). The arrow indicates where the insertion of ca. 300 bp at region V7 occurred during the evolution of centipedes.
